mapper.sql: id, templateCode, subject, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, content
mapper.insert: insert into t_notify_template (id, templateCode, subject, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, content) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{templateCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into t_notify_template
id,
templateCode,
subject,
createBy,
createTime,
updateBy,
updateTime,
effectiveFrom,
effectiveTo,
content,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{templateCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update t_notify_template
templateCode = #{templateCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
subject = #{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_notify_template set templateCode = #{templateCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, subject = #{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select
from t_notify_template where templateCode = #{templateCode} and effectiveFrom < now() and (effectiveTo is null or effectiveTo > now())

select * from t_notify_template
#{templateCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
#{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
order by priority

select count(*) from t_notify_template
#{templateCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
#{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select * from t_notify_template
#{model.templateCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.id,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
#{model.subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.content,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{model.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{model.effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{model.effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( templateCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or subject like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or content like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from t_notify_template
#{model.templateCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.id,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
#{model.subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.content,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{model.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
#{model.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{model.effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
#{model.effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( templateCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or subject like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or content like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
